citation: Kramida, A., Ralchenko, Yu., Reader, J., and NIST ASD Team. NIST Atomic Spectra Database (ver. 5.12), https://physics.nist.gov/asd
note: Strong persistent Li I lines from the ASD Lines query (observed air wavelengths, 200-2000 nm, Aki-ranked). Lithium is a one-valence-electron (alkali) atom, the natural showcase for the GSZ central field. The 2p fine-structure doublet (670.776/670.791 nm) is unresolved by the model's single 2p orbital; both map onto the one computed 2p->2s transition. Compared at the disclosed 5% tolerance.
